mapper.select:
SELECT com_cd_id , com_cd , com_cd_expl_sbc , sort_sn , supi_com_cd , supi_com_cd_id , rel_com_cd , use_yn , sys_id
, com_cd_eng_nm AS com_cd_nm
, com_cd_nm AS com_cd_nm
FROM rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_code_info WHERE supi_com_cd IN
#{item}
AND sys_id = #{sysId}
ORDER BY sort_sn

SELECT sys_id
, sys_eng_nm AS sysNm
, sys_nm AS sysNm
, sys_extra , sys_content , sys_seq , use_yn , reg_dtm , reg_emp_id , DATE_FORMAT(mod_dtm, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as mod_dtm , mod_emp_id FROM rotemDemo_zzz.zzz_system_info ORDER BY sys_seq
